data.title: Microservices Framework
data.description: Apple's website may use a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and flexibility.
data.technical_spec: Containers orchestrated via Kubernetes for service deployment.

data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Ensures compatibility across various devices with different screen sizes.
data.technical_spec: CSS media queries and flexible grid systems.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Boosts page load speed by distributing content globally.
data.technical_spec: Usage of Akamai or Cloudflare for optimized caching.

data.title: Server-Side Rendering
data.description: Improves SEO and initial page load times by rendering content on the server.
data.technical_spec: Node.js and Express server handling initial rendering.

data.title: Single Page Application (SPA) Components
data.description: Enhances user experience with fluid navigation and interactions.
data.technical_spec: React.js or Angular for dynamic content rendering.
